title: Glow Glow Berries
description: Now Glow Berries give you a glowing effect!
body:
# Glow Glow Berries

[![Modrinth Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/glow-glow-berries) [![GitHub Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/ferdinandkeller/glow-glow-berries)

**Glow Berries** have _glow_ in the name. But then why don't they give the glowing effect?

I don't know and I don't care, I fixed it anyways!!

Now **Glow Berries** give you a glowing effect for 2s whenever you eat them.

*Eating Glow Berries (I sparkle !):*
![Eating Glow Berries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bacc5d6c22773c2e273c36c79a6d691569dd562c.jpeg)

*Visible in the inventory too:*
![Glowing effect visible in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2b76d6c31d5529847a1cf2d5db5e52232d3f0ca.jpeg)
**nb: It shows 0s but that's because I couldn't get fast enough**
